TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: === 'Alilay ÁéČÁĪ≥/ÁéČŤúÄťĽć/ŚĆÖÁ©Ä === O sasowalen to 'alilay. ŤęĖŚŹäÁéČÁĪ≥/ÁéČŤúÄťĽć O tatapangan no ngangan no 'alilay i, o Zea mays, wono Einkilis a pangangan i o Corn,Maize Hananay, o masafelacay ko heci nira, ato matiyaay o kalorengos ko sa'osi, ano pakaynien i polong no Pinaloma ami nengneng i, mato o saadihayay ami palomaan no matayalay to kakaenen ko 'alily hananay, aca manga'ayay a moro-kakaenen no misa'ayamay ato misafafoyay ato a-a/maymay, ato Itini i misa^pahay to malosapi lomlom mi^cak to ^pah, ato itini i kalo-sapisanga to kalas kami. O pakayniay toya 'alilay. śúČťóúśĖľÁéČÁĪ≥/ÁéČŤúÄťĽć Pakayniay toya 'alilay hananay i, 'adihayay ko kasasiloma ami pangangan i cingaan, mato itini i kalokoka adihayay to ko kasasiloma a pangangan tora 'alilay hananay, alatek pakaalaay to cecay patek koka adihay nira, lomasato osowal no mafana'ay, wora 'alilay hananay i, o tatapangan nira alatek onaitiniay i cifo'ay a Amirika amisatapang, ono Intian a tadamaanay a kakaenen, i'ayaw ho i na caayho katakalaw ko lengaw noya 'alilay, likol sato o tamdaw to komafana'ay ami sanga' tosaka takalaw nira, sanaw satakalaw sato ko 'alilay i matini, a caay to katalaw tofa^det, tangasa to i 16seci tiya itiyato ami salingato ama patayni i tono Holaman a niyalo' ama paloma koya 'alilay, sa'ayaway ilaay to ama tilid tini i Mingcaw to pakaylaay toya 'lilay hananay, dodosato ilaay to ama lengnak a tayra icowaco:wa no kaholaman, mitowol to kaadihay no pipaloma to panay, tangasa i 2012 a mihecaan i mikikaka to kalo maamaan a pinaloma koka adihay nira, o safangcalay a kalengawan no 'alilay i, itilaay toya 30¬įÔľć50¬į no tosil no Cikiw sanaw likosato i, o 'alilay to ko sadihayay ami palomaan itini i kakaenen no hekal. Itini tono Taywan i, naitini i 16 Seci misalingato to ama pacomod, sanaw ano 'alawen kopi salingato no 'alilay ama paloma i, matafesiway to ko sepat patek koka halafing no 'alilay ama paloma itini i Taywan , ia'ayaw o 'alilay ami paloma itini i Taywan i, saheto sanay itini i lotok ato hadhad amipaloma, caay kasacecay ko tayal ami paloma to 'alilay, o likolsato tiya o kanatal safo to komi padamaay to tayal to 'alilay, itiyaay to a tadamaan ko tayal to 'alilay. O tayal to 'alilayÁéČÁĪ≥/ÁéČŤúÄťĽćÁöĄÁĒ®ťÄĒ O 'alilay hananay i, itini i polong tono hekalan ami palomaan to kakaenen, oya misangaan tono tamdawan a kakaenen, atoya misangaan to sapakaen to fafoy ato kalo'ayam, aca o sasangaen to kalomaamaan a sapakaen, aca o malosapacamol to maamaan a sasangaen to poliyaw ato tayhi, caay ka mamalasawad ko 'alilay hananay, galefen itini i Taywan, ano 'alilay to ano kodasing to, hatilaay to ko tayal ami sanga ato miforfor to todongay o kakaenen,nawhani hatiraay to kolarok ami papaloma to 'alilay, o todongay to o tatangtangen a kakaenen, ato o tatodohen a kakaenen ilaay haca kola ko^sannay hananay a 'alilay, ato tada ko^sanay hananay a 'alilay, romasato ora matiyaay o coyka a fangcalay a tangsol hananay ami simata^ akomaen a 'alilay, o tadafangcalay haw i , o caay ka cicamor to masamaamaanay a sapayiyo a 'alilay, nawhani omipalomaay to 'alilay i, ilasaca ko pifongsa ami patay to kacifaow ato misakapah to rengaw aci heci no 'alilay, sanaw irasahca kopi kingsa no safo to 'alilay, metalaw to kakali'angan to tileng no tamdaw a koma^en, lomasato, ira haca kora kaladatengan a tefo' a 'alilay, o hatilaay a 'alilay i, manga'ayay ami saadihay ami paloma, o todongay to o malodateng to kaen no tamdaw. O tayal to 'alilay. ÁéČÁĪ≥ÁöĄÁ®ģś§ć Ano so^linen a somowal to pakaylaay to 'alilay i, tangasa imatini macakat to ko fana' no tamdaw to tayal to pakayniay i 'alilay, mafana' to ami palalamod to sapaloma, sanaw irato koya Ciin kaycaw hananay a 'alilay, caay to kalecad to i 'aya:way ami palomaan i lotok ato hadhaday o omah, caay to katalaw to fawo, fangcay to kohci makapahay to nenengen, ngalefen to itini i Amilika ,saadihay sato ami paloma, to sapacakay a patayni i loma a kanatalan, osanay haw i to sapakaen to kolong ato fafoy ato 'ayam ato kalomaamaan, aca irangen to sasanga'en a pala-otong, todongay to kakaenen no tamdaw, orasa yamipalomaan a 'alilay i, adihayay ko kasasiloma nira, caay ka 'edengan sa ono tamdaw a cecay to kakaenen ko mipalomaan, halo o sapakaen to masamaama:any a ma'oripay, sanaw adihay ko kasasiloma no ngangan no mi palomaan to 'aliliay, sanaw tangasa imatini, caay ko mamalasawad ko 'alilay, ano o sasanga'en to wotong,ano o nananomen to,ano o sasanga'en to to simal,ano dateng to,caay ka'emin a sawalen ko sasanga'en to 'alilay. O 'alilay itini i Taywan. śúČťóúŚŹįÁĀ£ÁéČÁĪ≥/ÁéČŤúÄťĽć O 'alilay i tini i Taywan , nano 'ayaw isa tapang, saheto sanay omi cakayan naitini i padaka Amirika ato timolay Amilika a Pasi , mi pacomod i Takaw nacecay a pakaala 400 emangan no Ton , o lanan a 'alilay i oya ma'icangay 'atekakay to o ailangen ho, o sasanga'en to oton, ato piyang a kasi, ato sapakaen to fafoy ato 'ayam/topi, ato sasangaen to masamaamaa:nay a kakaenen, nikaorila ano saheto ono nairomaay a kanatal ami cakayan a 'alilay I caay to ka ngaay, sanaw misa'icel ami paloma to 'alilay kono itniay i Taywanay , nawhani o naitiniay Amirika i, adihay ko ciinkaycaw hananay a 'liliay, caay ka fangcal to tileng no tamdaw kolilanan, o saka kaliang no tileng no tamdaw ano kaenen, toyasato misa'icel to ami paloma tono tolongay o so'elinay facalay a 'alilay, nga'ayay a kala-datengen, rikolsato saadihay sato komipalomaay, tangasa i 1990 a mihecaan oma palomaay to 'alilay a omah tangasa irako enemay a kongcin , cecay mihca pakaara to 25 eman tonsoan , likor sato toya misalinato ami pacomod toya WTO hananay a sa'opo tiya, itiyaay to ama lowan komipalomaay, saadihay sato koma siwkenay a omah, nikaorila toya mafana' to ko sefo , itiya sato ami safaloco ami saliyaw misakakahad topi palomaan to 'alilay, nikaolira imatini omi plomaan a 'aliliay sahetoay ono Amilikaay kosaadihayay a 'alilay tolanan minfong san haw . Nikaorila caay ka awa kono mita o Taywan , ami sangaan to sapaloma a 'alilay, iraay koya Taynong 1 haw hananay a 'alilay, todongay o so^linay ono mitanan ami sangaan a sapaloma a 'alilay, naitini i 'etip tangasa i wali Howlan , solin ami sa'icel ami palowad tono mitanan o Taywan a 'alilay. (Siwkulan Amis/Pangcah Suman 2024.02.11) Tahapinanang ,śēÖŚźć."
S.PHON: === °a…ĺi…ĺaj **/***/** === o~u saso~uwa…ĺ…ôn to~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj. ****/*** o~u tatapaŇčan no~u ŇčaŇčan no~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj i, o~u *…ôa majs, wo~uno~u …ôinki…ĺis a paŇčaŇčan i o~u ¶o~urn,mai*…ô ńßananaj, o~u masaf…ô…ĺa ¶aj ko~u ńß…ô ¶i nira, ato~u matijaaj o~u ka…ĺo~ur…ôŇčo~us ko~u sa °o~usi, ano~u pakajni…ôn i po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u pina…ĺo~uma ami n…ôŇčn…ôŇč i, mato~u o~u saa…¨~…ģińßajaj ami pa…ĺo~umaan no~u mataja…ĺaj to~u kaka…ôn…ôn ko~u °a…ĺi…ĺj ńßananaj, a ¶a maŇča °ajaj a mo~uro~u-kaka…ôn…ôn no~u misa °ajamaj ato~u misafafo~ujaj ato~u a-a/majmaj, ato~u itini i misa Ēpańßaj to~u ko~u…ĺa ko~u Ēsannaj ńßananaj a °a…ĺi…ĺaj, ato~u ta…¨~…ģa ko~u Ēsanaj ńßananaj a °a…ĺi…ĺaj, ro~umasato~u o~ura matijaaj o~u ¶o~ujka a faŇč ¶a…ĺaj a taŇčso~u…ĺ ńßananaj ami simata Ē ako~uma…ôn a ¶ifao~uw ato~u misakapańß to~u r…ôŇčaw a ¶i ńß…ô ¶i no~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj, sanaw irasańß ¶a ko~upi kiŇčsa no~u safo~u to~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj, m…ôta…ĺaw to~u kaka…ĺi °aŇčan to~u ti…ĺ…ôŇč no~u tam…¨~…ģaw a ko~uma ma…ĺo~u…¨~…ģat…ôŇč to~u ka…ôn no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u taja…ĺ to~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj. ***** ano~u so~u Ē…ĺin…ôn a so~umo~uwa…ĺ to~u pakaj…ĺaaj to~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj i, taŇčasa imatini ma ¶akat to~u ko~u fana ° no~u tam…¨~…ģaw to~u taja…ĺ to~u pakajniaj i °a…ĺi…ĺaj, mafana ° to~u ami pa…ĺa…ĺamo~u…¨~…ģ to~u sapa…ĺo~uma, sanaw irato~u ko~uja ¶iin kaj ¶aw ńßananaj a °a…ĺi…ĺaj, ¶aaj to~u ka…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ to~u i °aja:waj ami pa…ĺo~umaan i …ĺo~uto~uk ato~u ńßa…¨~…ģńßa…¨~…ģaj o~u o~umańß, ¶aaj to~u kata…ĺaw to~u fawo~u, faŇč ¶aj to~u ko~uńß ¶i makapańßaj to~u n…ôn…ôŇč…ôn, Ňča…ĺ…ôf…ôn to~u itini i ami…ĺika ,saa…¨~…ģińßaj sato~u ami pa…ĺo~uma, to~u sapa ¶akaj a patajni i …ĺo~uma a kanata…ĺan, o~usanaj ńßaw i to~u sapaka…ôn to~u ko~u…ĺo~uŇč ato~u fafo~uj ato~u °ajam ato~u ka…ĺo~umaamaan, a ¶a iraŇč…ôn to~u sasaŇča °…ôn a pa…ĺa-o~uto~uŇč, to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj to~u kaka…ôn…ôn no~u tam…¨~…ģaw, o~urasa jamipa…ĺo~umaan a °a…ĺi…ĺaj i, a…¨~…ģińßajaj ko~u kasasi…ĺo~uma nira, ¶aaj ka °…ô…¨~…ģ…ôŇčan sa o~uno~u tam…¨~…ģaw a ¶…ô ¶aj to~u kaka…ôn…ôn ko~u mipa…ĺo~umaan, ńßa…ĺo~u o~u sapaka…ôn to~u masamaama:anj a ma °o~uripaj, sanaw a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u kasasi…ĺo~uma no~u ŇčaŇčan no~u mi pa…ĺo~umaan to~u °a…ĺi…ĺiaj, sanaw taŇčasa imatini, ¶aaj ko~u mama…ĺasawa…¨~…ģ ko~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj, ano~u o~u sasaŇča °…ôn to~u wo~uto~uŇč,ano~u o~u nanano~um…ôn to~u,ano~u o~u sasaŇča °…ôn to~u to~u sima…ĺ,ano~u …¨~…ģat…ôŇč to~u, ¶aaj ka °…ômin a sawa…ĺ…ôn ko~u sasaŇča °…ôn to~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj. o~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj itini i tajwan. ******/*** o~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj i tini i tajwan , nano~u °ajaw isa tapaŇč, sańß…ôto~u sanaj o~umi ¶akajan naitini i pa…¨~…ģaka amirika ato~u timo~u…ĺaj ami…ĺika a pasi , mi pa ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ i takaw na ¶…ô ¶aj a pakaa…ĺa *** …ômaŇčan no~u to~un , o~u …ĺanan a °a…ĺi…ĺaj i o~uja ma °i ¶aŇčaj °at…ôkakaj to~u o~u ai…ĺaŇč…ôn ńßo~u, o~u sasaŇča °…ôn to~u o~uto~un, ato~u pijaŇč a kasi, ato~u sapaka…ôn to~u fafo~uj ato~u °ajam/to~upi, ato~u sasaŇča…ôn to~u masamaamaa:naj a kaka…ôn…ôn, nikao~uri…ĺa ano~u sańß…ôto~u o~uno~u nairo~umaaj a kanata…ĺ ami ¶akajan a °a…ĺi…ĺaj i ¶aaj to~u ka Ňčaaj, sanaw misa °i ¶…ô…ĺ ami pa…ĺo~uma to~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj ko~uno~u itniaj i tajwanaj , nawńßani o~u naitiniaj amirika i, a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u ¶iinkaj ¶aw ńßananaj a °…ĺi…ĺiaj, ¶aaj ka faŇč ¶a…ĺ to~u ti…ĺ…ôŇč no~u tam…¨~…ģaw ko~u…ĺi…ĺanan, o~u saka ka…ĺiaŇč no~u ti…ĺ…ôŇč no~u tam…¨~…ģaw ano~u ka…ôn…ôn, to~ujasato~u misa °i ¶…ô…ĺ to~u ami pa…ĺo~uma to~uno~u to~u…ĺo~uŇčaj o~u so~u °…ô…ĺinaj fa ¶a…ĺaj a °a…ĺi…ĺaj, Ňča °ajaj a ka…ĺa-…¨~…ģat…ôŇč…ôn, riko~u…ĺsato~u saa…¨~…ģińßaj sato~u ko~umipa…ĺo~umaaj, taŇčasa i **** a mińß…ô ¶aan o~uma pa…ĺo~umaaj to~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj a o~umańß taŇčasa irako~u …ôn…ômaj a ko~uŇč ¶in , ¶…ô ¶aj mińß ¶a pakaara to~u ** …ôman to~unso~uan , …ĺiko~ur sato~u to~uja misa…ĺinato~u ami pa ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ to~uja wto~u ńßananaj a sa °o~upo~u tija, itijaaj to~u ama …ĺo~uwan ko~umipa…ĺo~umaaj, saa…¨~…ģińßaj sato~u ko~uma siwk…ônaj a o~umańß, nikao~uri…ĺa to~uja mafana ° to~u ko~u s…ôfo~u , itija sato~u ami safa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ami sa…ĺijaw misakakańßa…¨~…ģ to~upi pa…ĺo~umaan to~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj, nikao~u…ĺira imatini o~umi p…ĺo~umaan a °a…ĺi…ĺiaj sańß…ôto~uaj o~uno~u ami…ĺikaaj ko~usaa…¨~…ģińßajaj a °a…ĺi…ĺaj to~u…ĺanan minfo~uŇč san ńßaw . nikao~uri…ĺa ¶aaj ka awa ko~uno~u mita o~u tajwan , ami saŇčaan to~u sapa…ĺo~uma a °a…ĺi…ĺaj, iraaj ko~uja tajno~uŇč * ńßaw ńßananaj a °a…ĺi…ĺaj, to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj o~u so~u Ē…ĺinaj o~uno~u mitanan ami saŇčaan a sapa…ĺo~uma a °a…ĺi…ĺaj, naitini i °…ôtip taŇčasa i wa…ĺi ńßo~uw…ĺan , so~u…ĺin ami sa °i ¶…ô…ĺ ami pa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ to~uno~u mitanan o~u tajwan a °a…ĺi…ĺaj. (siwko~u~u…ĺan amis/paŇč ¶ańß so~u~uman ****.**.**) tańßapinanaŇč ,**."
S.FORM: === 'Alilay ÁéČÁĪ≥/ÁéČŤúÄťĽć/ŚĆÖÁ©Ä === O sasowalen to 'alilay. ŤęĖŚŹäÁéČÁĪ≥/ÁéČŤúÄťĽć O tatapangan no ngangan no 'alilay i, o Zea mays, wono Einkilis a pangangan i o Corn,Maize Hananay, o masafelacay ko heci nira, ato matiyaay o kalorengos ko sa'osi, ano pakaynien i polong no Pinaloma ami nengneng i, mato o saadihayay ami palomaan no matayalay to kakaenen ko 'alily hananay, aca manga'ayay a moro-kakaenen no misa'ayamay ato misafafoyay ato a-a/maymay, ato Itini i misa^pahay to malosapi lomlom mi^cak to ^pah, ato itini i kalo-sapisanga to kalas kami. O pakayniay toya 'alilay. śúČťóúśĖľÁéČÁĪ≥/ÁéČŤúÄťĽć Pakayniay toya 'alilay hananay i, 'adihayay ko kasasiloma ami pangangan i cingaan, mato itini i kalokoka adihayay to ko kasasiloma a pangangan tora 'alilay hananay, alatek pakaalaay to cecay patek koka adihay nira, lomasato osowal no mafana'ay, wora 'alilay hananay i, o tatapangan nira alatek onaitiniay i cifo'ay a Amirika amisatapang, ono Intian a tadamaanay a kakaenen, i'ayaw ho i na caayho katakalaw ko lengaw noya 'alilay, likol sato o tamdaw to komafana'ay ami sanga' tosaka takalaw nira, sanaw satakalaw sato ko 'alilay i matini, a caay to katalaw tofa^det, tangasa to i 16seci tiya itiyato ami salingato ama patayni i tono Holaman a niyalo' ama paloma koya 'alilay, sa'ayaway ilaay to ama tilid tini i Mingcaw to pakaylaay toya 'lilay hananay, dodosato ilaay to ama lengnak a tayra icowaco:wa no kaholaman, mitowol to kaadihay no pipaloma to panay, tangasa i 2012 a mihecaan i mikikaka to kalo maamaan a pinaloma koka adihay nira, o safangcalay a kalengawan no 'alilay i, itilaay toya 30¬įÔľć50¬į no tosil no Cikiw sanaw likosato i, o 'alilay to ko sadihayay ami palomaan itini i kakaenen no hekal. Itini tono Taywan i, naitini i 16 Seci misalingato to ama pacomod, sanaw ano 'alawen kopi salingato no 'alilay ama paloma i, matafesiway to ko sepat patek koka halafing no 'alilay ama paloma itini i Taywan , ia'ayaw o 'alilay ami paloma itini i Taywan i, saheto sanay itini i lotok ato hadhad amipaloma, caay kasacecay ko tayal ami paloma to 'alilay, o likolsato tiya o kanatal safo to komi padamaay to tayal to 'alilay, itiyaay to a tadamaan ko tayal to 'alilay. O tayal to 'alilayÁéČÁĪ≥/ÁéČŤúÄťĽćÁöĄÁĒ®ťÄĒ O 'alilay hananay i, itini i polong tono hekalan ami palomaan to kakaenen, oya misangaan tono tamdawan a kakaenen, atoya misangaan to sapakaen to fafoy ato kalo'ayam, aca o sasangaen to kalomaamaan a sapakaen, aca o malosapacamol to maamaan a sasangaen to poliyaw ato tayhi, caay ka mamalasawad ko 'alilay hananay, galefen itini i Taywan, ano 'alilay to ano kodasing to, hatilaay to ko tayal ami sanga ato miforfor to todongay o kakaenen,nawhani hatiraay to kolarok ami papaloma to 'alilay, o todongay to o tatangtangen a kakaenen, ato o tatodohen a kakaenen ilaay haca kola ko^sannay hananay a 'alilay, ato tada ko^sanay hananay a 'alilay, romasato ora matiyaay o coyka a fangcalay a tangsol hananay ami simata^ akomaen a 'alilay, o tadafangcalay haw i , o caay ka cicamor to masamaamaanay a sapayiyo a 'alilay, nawhani omipalomaay to 'alilay i, ilasaca ko pifongsa ami patay to kacifaow ato misakapah to rengaw aci heci no 'alilay, sanaw irasahca kopi kingsa no safo to 'alilay, metalaw to kakali'angan to tileng no tamdaw a koma^en, lomasato, ira haca kora kaladatengan a tefo' a 'alilay, o hatilaay a 'alilay i, manga'ayay ami saadihay ami paloma, o todongay to o malodateng to kaen no tamdaw. O tayal to 'alilay. ÁéČÁĪ≥ÁöĄÁ®ģś§ć Ano so^linen a somowal to pakaylaay to 'alilay i, tangasa imatini macakat to ko fana' no tamdaw to tayal to pakayniay i 'alilay, mafana' to ami palalamod to sapaloma, sanaw irato koya Ciin kaycaw hananay a 'alilay, caay to kalecad to i 'aya:way ami palomaan i lotok ato hadhaday o omah, caay to katalaw to fawo, fangcay to kohci makapahay to nenengen, ngalefen to itini i Amilika ,saadihay sato ami paloma, to sapacakay a patayni i loma a kanatalan, osanay haw i to sapakaen to kolong ato fafoy ato 'ayam ato kalomaamaan, aca irangen to sasanga'en a pala-otong, todongay to kakaenen no tamdaw, orasa yamipalomaan a 'alilay i, adihayay ko kasasiloma nira, caay ka 'edengan sa ono tamdaw a cecay to kakaenen ko mipalomaan, halo o sapakaen to masamaama:any a ma'oripay, sanaw adihay ko kasasiloma no ngangan no mi palomaan to 'aliliay, sanaw tangasa imatini, caay ko mamalasawad ko 'alilay, ano o sasanga'en to wotong,ano o nananomen to,ano o sasanga'en to to simal,ano dateng to,caay ka'emin a sawalen ko sasanga'en to 'alilay. O 'alilay itini i Taywan. śúČťóúŚŹįÁĀ£ÁéČÁĪ≥/ÁéČŤúÄťĽć O 'alilay i tini i Taywan , nano 'ayaw isa tapang, saheto sanay omi cakayan naitini i padaka Amirika ato timolay Amilika a Pasi , mi pacomod i Takaw nacecay a pakaala 400 emangan no Ton , o lanan a 'alilay i oya ma'icangay 'atekakay to o ailangen ho, o sasanga'en to oton, ato piyang a kasi, ato sapakaen to fafoy ato 'ayam/topi, ato sasangaen to masamaamaa:nay a kakaenen, nikaorila ano saheto ono nairomaay a kanatal ami cakayan a 'alilay I caay to ka ngaay, sanaw misa'icel ami paloma to 'alilay kono itniay i Taywanay , nawhani o naitiniay Amirika i, adihay ko ciinkaycaw hananay a 'liliay, caay ka fangcal to tileng no tamdaw kolilanan, o saka kaliang no tileng no tamdaw ano kaenen, toyasato misa'icel to ami paloma tono tolongay o so'elinay facalay a 'alilay, nga'ayay a kala-datengen, rikolsato saadihay sato komipalomaay, tangasa i 1990 a mihecaan oma palomaay to 'alilay a omah tangasa irako enemay a kongcin , cecay mihca pakaara to 25 eman tonsoan , likor sato toya misalinato ami pacomod toya WTO hananay a sa'opo tiya, itiyaay to ama lowan komipalomaay, saadihay sato koma siwkenay a omah, nikaorila toya mafana' to ko sefo , itiya sato ami safaloco ami saliyaw misakakahad topi palomaan to 'alilay, nikaolira imatini omi plomaan a 'aliliay sahetoay ono Amilikaay kosaadihayay a 'alilay tolanan minfong san haw . Nikaorila caay ka awa kono mita o Taywan , ami sangaan to sapaloma a 'alilay, iraay koya Taynong 1 haw hananay a 'alilay, todongay o so^linay ono mitanan ami sangaan a sapaloma a 'alilay, naitini i 'etip tangasa i wali Howlan , solin ami sa'icel ami palowad tono mitanan o Taywan a 'alilay. (Siwkulan Amis/Pangcah Suman 2024.02.11) Tahapinanang ,śēÖŚźć."
S.PHON: === °a…ĺi…ĺaj **/***/** === o~u saso~uwa…ĺ…ôn to~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj. ****/*** o~u tatapaŇčan no~u ŇčaŇčan no~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj i, o~u *…ôa majs, wo~uno~u …ôinki…ĺis a paŇčaŇčan i o~u ¶o~urn,mai*…ô ńßananaj, o~u masaf…ô…ĺa ¶aj ko~u ńß…ô ¶i nira, ato~u matijaaj o~u ka…ĺo~ur…ôŇčo~us ko~u sa °o~usi, ano~u pakajni…ôn i po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u pina…ĺo~uma ami n…ôŇčn…ôŇč i, mato~u o~u saa…¨~…ģińßajaj ami pa…ĺo~umaan no~u mataja…ĺaj to~u kaka…ôn…ôn ko~u °a…ĺi…ĺj ńßananaj, a ¶a maŇča °ajaj a mo~uro~u-kaka…ôn…ôn no~u misa °ajamaj ato~u misafafo~ujaj ato~u a-a/majmaj, ato~u itini i misa Ēpańßaj to~u ma…ĺo~usapi …ĺo~um…ĺo~um mi Ē ¶ak to~u Ēpańß, ato~u itini i ka…ĺo~u-sapisaŇča to~u ka…ĺas kami. o~u pakajniaj to~uja °a…ĺi…ĺaj. *****/*** pakajniaj to~uja °a…ĺi…ĺaj ńßananaj i, °a…¨~…ģińßajaj ko~u kasasi…ĺo~uma ami paŇčaŇčan i ¶iŇčaan, mato~u itini i ka…ĺo~uko~uka a…¨~…ģińßajaj to~u ko~u kasasi…ĺo~uma a paŇčaŇčan to~ura °a…ĺi…ĺaj ńßananaj, a…ĺat…ôk pakaa…ĺaaj to~u ¶…ô ¶aj pat…ôk ko~uka a…¨~…ģińßaj nira, …ĺo~umasato~u o~uso~uwa…ĺ no~u mafana °aj, wo~ura °a…ĺi…ĺaj ńßananaj i, o~u tatapaŇčan nira a…ĺat…ôk o~unaitiniaj i ¶ifo~u °aj a amirika amisatapaŇč, o~uno~u intian a ta…¨~…ģamaanaj a kaka…ôn…ôn, i °ajaw ńßo~u i na ¶aajńßo~u kataka…ĺaw ko~u …ĺ…ôŇčaw no~uja °a…ĺi…ĺaj, …ĺiko~u…ĺ sato~u o~u tam…¨~…ģaw to~u ko~umafana °aj ami saŇča ° to~usaka taka…ĺaw nira, sanaw sataka…ĺaw sato~u ko~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj i matini, a ¶aaj to~u kata…ĺaw to~ufa Ē…¨~…ģ…ôt, taŇčasa to~u i **s…ô ¶i tija itijato~u ami sa…ĺiŇčato~u ama patajni i to~uno~u ńßo~u…ĺaman a nija…ĺo~u ° ama pa…ĺo~uma ko~uja °a…ĺi…ĺaj, sa °ajawaj i…ĺaaj to~u ama ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ tini i miŇč ¶aw to~u pakaj…ĺaaj to~uja °…ĺi…ĺaj ńßananaj, …¨~…ģo~u…¨~…ģo~usato~u i…ĺaaj to~u ama …ĺ…ôŇčnak a tajra i ¶o~uwa ¶o~u:wa no~u kańßo~u…ĺaman, mito~uwo~u…ĺ to~u kaa…¨~…ģińßaj no~u pipa…ĺo~uma to~u panaj, taŇčasa i **** a mińß…ô ¶aan i mikikaka to~u ka…ĺo~u maamaan a pina…ĺo~uma ko~uka a…¨~…ģińßaj nira, o~u safaŇč ¶a…ĺaj a ka…ĺ…ôŇčawan no~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj i, iti…ĺaaj to~uja ******* no~u to~usi…ĺ no~u ¶ikiw sanaw …ĺiko~usato~u i, o~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj to~u ko~u sa…¨~…ģińßajaj ami pa…ĺo~umaan itini i kaka…ôn…ôn no~u ńß…ôka…ĺ. itini to~uno~u tajwan i, naitini i ** s…ô ¶i misa…ĺiŇčato~u to~u ama pa ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ, sanaw ano~u °a…ĺaw…ôn ko~upi sa…ĺiŇčato~u no~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj ama pa…ĺo~uma i, mataf…ôsiwaj to~u ko~u s…ôpat pat…ôk ko~uka ńßa…ĺafiŇč no~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj ama pa…ĺo~uma itini i tajwan , ia °ajaw o~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj ami pa…ĺo~uma itini i tajwan i, sańß…ôto~u sanaj itini i …ĺo~uto~uk ato~u ńßa…¨~…ģńßa…¨~…ģ amipa…ĺo~uma, ¶aaj kasa ¶…ô ¶aj ko~u taja…ĺ ami pa…ĺo~uma to~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj, o~u …ĺiko~u…ĺsato~u tija o~u kanata…ĺ safo~u to~u ko~umi pa…¨~…ģamaaj to~u taja…ĺ to~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj, itijaaj to~u a ta…¨~…ģamaan ko~u taja…ĺ to~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj. o~u taja…ĺ to~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj**/****** o~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj ńßananaj i, itini i po~u…ĺo~uŇč to~uno~u ńß…ôka…ĺan ami pa…ĺo~umaan to~u kaka…ôn…ôn, o~uja misaŇčaan to~uno~u tam…¨~…ģawan a kaka…ôn…ôn, ato~uja misaŇčaan to~u sapaka…ôn to~u fafo~uj ato~u ka…ĺo~u °ajam, a ¶a o~u sasaŇča…ôn to~u ka…ĺo~umaamaan a sapaka…ôn, a ¶a o~u ma…ĺo~usapa ¶amo~u…ĺ to~u maamaan a sasaŇča…ôn to~u po~u…ĺijaw ato~u tajńßi, ¶aaj ka mama…ĺasawa…¨~…ģ ko~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj ńßananaj, *a…ĺ…ôf…ôn itini i tajwan, ano~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj to~u ano~u ko~u…¨~…ģasiŇč to~u, ńßati…ĺaaj to~u ko~u taja…ĺ ami saŇča ato~u mifo~urfo~ur to~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj o~u kaka…ôn…ôn,nawńßani ńßatiraaj to~u ko~u…ĺaro~uk ami papa…ĺo~uma to~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj, o~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj to~u o~u tataŇčtaŇč…ôn a kaka…ôn…ôn, ato~u o~u tato~u…¨~…ģo~uńß…ôn a kaka…ôn…ôn i…ĺaaj ńßa ¶a ko~u…ĺa ko~u Ēsannaj ńßananaj a °a…ĺi…ĺaj, ato~u ta…¨~…ģa ko~u Ēsanaj ńßananaj a °a…ĺi…ĺaj, ro~umasato~u o~ura matijaaj o~u ¶o~ujka a faŇč ¶a…ĺaj a taŇčso~u…ĺ ńßananaj ami simata Ē ako~uma…ôn a °a…ĺi…ĺaj, o~u ta…¨~…ģafaŇč ¶a…ĺaj ńßaw i , o~u ¶aaj ka ¶i ¶amo~ur to~u masamaamaanaj a sapajijo~u a °a…ĺi…ĺaj, nawńßani o~umipa…ĺo~umaaj to~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj i, i…ĺasa ¶a ko~u pifo~uŇčsa ami pataj to~u ka ¶ifao~uw ato~u misakapańß to~u r…ôŇčaw a ¶i ńß…ô ¶i no~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj, sanaw irasańß ¶a ko~upi kiŇčsa no~u safo~u to~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj, m…ôta…ĺaw to~u kaka…ĺi °aŇčan to~u ti…ĺ…ôŇč no~u tam…¨~…ģaw a ko~uma Ē…ôn, …ĺo~umasato~u, ira ńßa ¶a ko~ura ka…ĺa…¨~…ģat…ôŇčan a t…ôfo~u ° a °a…ĺi…ĺaj, o~u ńßati…ĺaaj a °a…ĺi…ĺaj i, maŇča °ajaj ami saa…¨~…ģińßaj ami pa…ĺo~uma, o~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj to~u o~u ma…ĺo~u…¨~…ģat…ôŇč to~u ka…ôn no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u taja…ĺ to~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj. ***** ano~u so~u Ē…ĺin…ôn a so~umo~uwa…ĺ to~u pakaj…ĺaaj to~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj i, taŇčasa imatini ma ¶akat to~u ko~u fana ° no~u tam…¨~…ģaw to~u taja…ĺ to~u pakajniaj i °a…ĺi…ĺaj, mafana ° to~u ami pa…ĺa…ĺamo~u…¨~…ģ to~u sapa…ĺo~uma, sanaw irato~u ko~uja ¶iin kaj ¶aw ńßananaj a °a…ĺi…ĺaj, ¶aaj to~u ka…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ to~u i °aja:waj ami pa…ĺo~umaan i …ĺo~uto~uk ato~u ńßa…¨~…ģńßa…¨~…ģaj o~u o~umańß, ¶aaj to~u kata…ĺaw to~u fawo~u, faŇč ¶aj to~u ko~uńß ¶i makapańßaj to~u n…ôn…ôŇč…ôn, Ňča…ĺ…ôf…ôn to~u itini i ami…ĺika ,saa…¨~…ģińßaj sato~u ami pa…ĺo~uma, to~u sapa ¶akaj a patajni i …ĺo~uma a kanata…ĺan, o~usanaj ńßaw i to~u sapaka…ôn to~u ko~u…ĺo~uŇč ato~u fafo~uj ato~u °ajam ato~u ka…ĺo~umaamaan, a ¶a iraŇč…ôn to~u sasaŇča °…ôn a pa…ĺa-o~uto~uŇč, to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj to~u kaka…ôn…ôn no~u tam…¨~…ģaw, o~urasa jamipa…ĺo~umaan a °a…ĺi…ĺaj i, a…¨~…ģińßajaj ko~u kasasi…ĺo~uma nira, ¶aaj ka °…ô…¨~…ģ…ôŇčan sa o~uno~u tam…¨~…ģaw a ¶…ô ¶aj to~u kaka…ôn…ôn ko~u mipa…ĺo~umaan, ńßa…ĺo~u o~u sapaka…ôn to~u masamaama:anj a ma °o~uripaj, sanaw a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u kasasi…ĺo~uma no~u ŇčaŇčan no~u mi pa…ĺo~umaan to~u °a…ĺi…ĺiaj, sanaw taŇčasa imatini, ¶aaj ko~u mama…ĺasawa…¨~…ģ ko~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj, ano~u o~u sasaŇča °…ôn to~u wo~uto~uŇč,ano~u o~u nanano~um…ôn to~u,ano~u o~u sasaŇča °…ôn to~u to~u sima…ĺ,ano~u …¨~…ģat…ôŇč to~u, ¶aaj ka °…ômin a sawa…ĺ…ôn ko~u sasaŇča °…ôn to~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj. o~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj itini i tajwan. ******/*** o~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj i tini i tajwan , nano~u °ajaw isa tapaŇč, sańß…ôto~u sanaj o~umi ¶akajan naitini i pa…¨~…ģaka amirika ato~u timo~u…ĺaj ami…ĺika a pasi , mi pa ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ i takaw na ¶…ô ¶aj a pakaa…ĺa *** …ômaŇčan no~u to~un , o~u …ĺanan a °a…ĺi…ĺaj i o~uja ma °i ¶aŇčaj °at…ôkakaj to~u o~u ai…ĺaŇč…ôn ńßo~u, o~u sasaŇča °…ôn to~u o~uto~un, ato~u pijaŇč a kasi, ato~u sapaka…ôn to~u fafo~uj ato~u °ajam/to~upi, ato~u sasaŇča…ôn to~u masamaamaa:naj a kaka…ôn…ôn, nikao~uri…ĺa ano~u sańß…ôto~u o~uno~u nairo~umaaj a kanata…ĺ ami ¶akajan a °a…ĺi…ĺaj i ¶aaj to~u ka Ňčaaj, sanaw misa °i ¶…ô…ĺ ami pa…ĺo~uma to~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj ko~uno~u itniaj i tajwanaj , nawńßani o~u naitiniaj amirika i, a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u ¶iinkaj ¶aw ńßananaj a °…ĺi…ĺiaj, ¶aaj ka faŇč ¶a…ĺ to~u ti…ĺ…ôŇč no~u tam…¨~…ģaw ko~u…ĺi…ĺanan, o~u saka ka…ĺiaŇč no~u ti…ĺ…ôŇč no~u tam…¨~…ģaw ano~u ka…ôn…ôn, to~ujasato~u misa °i ¶…ô…ĺ to~u ami pa…ĺo~uma to~uno~u to~u…ĺo~uŇčaj o~u so~u °…ô…ĺinaj fa ¶a…ĺaj a °a…ĺi…ĺaj, Ňča °ajaj a ka…ĺa-…¨~…ģat…ôŇč…ôn, riko~u…ĺsato~u saa…¨~…ģińßaj sato~u ko~umipa…ĺo~umaaj, taŇčasa i **** a mińß…ô ¶aan o~uma pa…ĺo~umaaj to~u °a…ĺi…ĺaj a o~umańß taŇčasa irako~u …ôn…ômaj a ko~uŇč ¶in , ¶…ô ¶aj mińß ¶a pakaara to~u ** …ôman to~unso~uan , …ĺiko~ur sato~u to~uja misa…ĺinato~u
